title: Property Observers
description: Automatically react to changes in a property's value using the didSet observer.
problemStatement:
Value tracking! Define a struct `StepCounter` with a variable `totalSteps` (type `Int`, default `0`). Add a `didSet` observer that prints `"Steps updated to X"` whenever the value changes.

**Requirement:** The observer should only trigger AFTER the value has changed.
hints: Property observers are not called when the property is first initialized.
